rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, suggesting specific reordering and structural improvements.
rationale.RX.1: The agent explicitly discloses uncertainties regarding dataset sizes and citations, marking confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays within the agreed scope, addressing each issue without drifting off-topic.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or errors were introduced; the critique was constructive and accurate.
rationale.RX.5: While some changes are traced, not every non-cosmetic change is annotated with sources or reasons.
